title: ICMR NIHR – Field Supervisor – 1 Posts
shortInfo: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Field Supervisor. The Walk-in on 08-06-2026.

basic_details.short_information: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Field Supervisor. The Walk-in on 08-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences with 2 years' experience in community-based health projects, preferably NCD or surveillance studies OR Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences.
